MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DAVID LEE M.D., PEDIATRIX MEDICAL GROUP OF CALIFORNIA P.C. AND SAN FRANCISCO NEONATOLOGY MEDICAL GROUP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar per request of moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES E. FOX OF FOX & FOX, TEL. NO. (818) 986-4494 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. R. WESLEY PRATT OF HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP, TEL. NO. 288-9800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS SUTTER WEST BAY ET. AL.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS LESLIE CRUZ, SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER AND KATHLEEN COOPER, R.N.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to July 31, 2013, to allow defendant a chance to test the foundation of plaintiff's experts per St. Mary Med. Ctr. v. Sup. Crt (1996) 50 Cal.App.4th 1531, 1540. Defendant may file a 5 page supplemental brief by June 17, 2013 and Plaintiff may file a supplemental brief by July 24, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
